_comment: Paper portfolio synced to Ahmad's real holdings as of 2026-06-17. Quantities, avg costs, and Shariah flags reflect the EClear app screenshot. Starting cash reset to 1,000,000 PKR; cash = 1,000,000 - total_cost_basis = 389,700 PKR. From this point the paper book mirrors Ahmad's actual positions.

holdings.thesis: Cheapest bank P/E ~6; 7%+ yield; Shariah-compliant; R-001 NIM expansion at 11.5% rate; Islamic franchise growing market share

swing.note: cheapest bank ~6.8x; RSI 69 warming. Trim into blow-off, not into trend.

holdings.thesis: Best F score — P/E 10.35; ~6.9% yield; 6 consecutive quarterly payouts; kharif demand; Shariah-compliant

swing.note: highest-yield core; income anchor — trim light, keep base for dividend. P-028 floor 540.

holdings.thesis: Quality cement franchise; FY27 construction-WHT cut demand tailwind; Shariah-compliant; higher P/E warranted for sector leader

swing.note: cement leader; WHT-cut + infra tailwind. RSI 60, room. Swing the cyclical upside.

holdings.thesis: Quality Islamic bank; R-001 NIM expansion at 11.5%; growing market share vs conventional; Shariah-compliant

swing.note: Islamic bank, R-001 NIM intact; new 52w-high zone RSI 63. P-030 trend call. Ride toward 560, trim there.

holdings.thesis: Cheap E&P P/E ~8; state-backed low debt; Baragazi 21mn bbl discovery; Shariah-compliant; oil-headwind watch (Brent <$80)

swing.note: MOST ACTIVE swing watch. At 52w-high 337 + oil <$80 (Brent ~$76, NEARING $75 trim trigger). DUAL trigger: oil break ~$75 -> defensive trim regardless of price; OR hits 350/365 -> profit trim ladder. Lowest yield -> earn return via swing not dividend. P-029 stop 295.

holdings.thesis: Cheap auto P/E ~7; EPS rising 123->192->293; PAT 9.7->23bn; ~9.5% trailing yield (Rs148 9M-FY26, Rs10 face); Shariah-compliant (KMI All Share); margin expansion; Finance Bill overhang resolved. Half-size starter (Ahmad chose 2.5%).

swing.note: STARTER half-size (10sh ~2.6% book). Value+yield+rising-EPS compliant. 51% of 52w range (1695-2430), reclaiming MA200 (2045), RSI 58.7 not extended. Stop 1940 ~2xATR (-6.3%). Room to add to full 5% on a pullback toward 2000-2040 if thesis holds. Honesty caveat: Q3 quarterly PAT flat ~6.7bn despite +20% YoY sales (tax/margin mix) -> stable-high not accelerating.

_holding_schema.first_bought: YYYY-MM-DD or 'pre-YYYY-MM-DD' if pre-dating the paper book

swing_policy.mandate: Ahmad 2026-06-18, REAL-money as of 2026-06-21: aggressive-but-disciplined core+swing on the REAL EClear account (= learning playground; gates stay on). All holdings swing_eligible. Goal = total return >=20%/yr (yield ~6% + swing ~14%), above better. Each run: (1) check every holding vs its swing target/stop/trim_ladder and SUGGEST SELL/TRIM when target hit or stop broken (re-run T/F/E first; if thesis still strong, raise target + trail stop instead of blind sell); (2) SCAN full KSE-100 for NEW swing/yield opportunities and propose REAL sized adds (entry/stop/target). Calls are REAL: Ahmad executes in EClear, reports fills, agent logs to trade_ledger as REAL. Agent NEVER places orders. Full R-PROC-001 diligence required before any add. Concentration cap ~20-25% single name (tighten to 20% until edge proven n>=40). No leverage. R-EXP-006: no contrarian conv->=5 directional calls in up-tape. Size for LEARNING, not max profit, while track record matures.
swing_policy.scan_scope: full KSE-100 universe (100 constituents; 5yr OHLC + fundamentals available)
swing_policy.yield_estimates_caveat: est_yield_pct on each holding is ROUGH (full-year payout approximated). VERIFY from data/fundamentals/{SYM}.json full payout history before any income-based decision.
swing_policy.caps: per-position <=20% of total; per-sector watch (Banks already 38% of invested); prefer UNCORRELATED adds over deepening existing sleeves (concentration caveat).

performance.note: 2026-06-24 (DAILY RUN #13): KSE-100 179,571.26 (+1,878.34, +1.06%) STRONG REBOUND on 851M volume (vs 292M prior) after 3-day pullback; above MA20 (174,310)/MA50/MA200, RSI 69 -> melt-up regime INTACT (shakeout, not break; P-034 HIT). Reconcile 3 matured ALL HIT (P-031 NO-TRADE cash-discipline, P-033 FFC>=550 floor, P-034 KSE100>MA20) -> record 30 graded/26 HIT/4 MISS=86.7%. NEW TRADE: BUY 10sh INDU @ 2070.34 (REAL, Ahmad executed; half-size 2.5% starter; full R-PROC-001 diligence clear: P/E~7, EPS rising, ~9.5% yield, Shariah COMPLIANT confirmed, RSI 58.7, MA200 reclaim, Finance Bill resolved). Cash 176,538.20 -> 155,804.20 (net 20,734). Holdings now 6 (FABL/FFC/LUCK/MEBL/OGDC/INDU). Total equity: holdings MTM 626,340.10 + INDU 20,703.40 + cash 155,804.20 = 802,847.70; cum +0.36% vs 800k base. Deployed ~80.6%, cash ~19.4%. No swing level hit on the 5 olds (OGDC first-trim 350 only +3% away, high 340.75; oil ~$76 nearing $75 defensive trim). Sector of invested (incl INDU): Banks ~35% / Fertilizer ~30% / Cement ~18% / E&P ~14% / Auto ~3%. MANUAL counterfactual: KSE-100 +0.62% since 06-17 sync vs BOOK +0.36% -> book -0.26pp BEHIND index (cash drag on the bounce day; cushion that helped during pullback now costs on rebound). // PRIOR 2026-06-22 (DAILY RUN, run late on 23rd — MTM, NO TRADES): KSE-100 178,471.87 (-0.25%) 2nd mild down day on LOW volume (230M); still above MA20 (173,426)/MA50/MA200, RSI 67.6 — digestion not break. Holdings MTM at 06-22 closes: FABL 96.96, FFC 557.94, LUCK 459.06, MEBL 512.17, OGDC 334.25 → holdings 621,952 + cash 176,538.20 = total 798,490; cum -0.19% vs 0.8M base (essentially flat; book held within 0.06pp of the -0.25% index). No swing level hit (no stops/targets/trims triggered) → HOLD all 5. INDU = top scan candidate, full diligence cleared (P/E 8.3, EPS +12%, ~12% yield, RSI 54), Shariah note-only UNCONFIRMED → Ahmad chose WATCH-ONLY (keep cash dry into Finance Bill ~06-30 binary). Cash unchanged 176,538.20 (22.1%). Sector of invested: Banks 36.2% / Fertilizer 31.4% / Cement 18.5% / E&P 14.0%. // PRIOR 2026-06-21 (CAPITAL CORRECTION + REGIME): Ahmad corrected true total account equity to 800,000 PKR (whole EClear account = 5 holdings MTM 623,461.80 + cash). Prior recorded 1,515,232.90 (on a 1.5M base after the 06-18 +500k injection rebase) was WRONG / not the real account. This is a CORRECTION of the recorded total, NOT a loss. Re-based: starting_cash 1.5M -> 0.8M; cash = 800,000 - 623,461.80 = 176,538.20 (~22% dry powder, was overstated as 59%); cumulative_return_pct re-anchored to 0.00% from this true 0.8M base going forward (the earlier % was measured against a fictitious denominator). Holdings (FABL/FFC/LUCK/MEBL/OGDC qty+cost) UNCHANGED. Regime: real account = learning playground, aggressive-but-disciplined swing (gates stay on). The 06-18 +500k 'injection' is treated as never having been real for this book. // PRIOR (now superseded) 2026-06-19 (DAILY RUN #10 MTM): KSE-100 -1.36% reversal (US-Iran Geneva talks postponed). Book MTM at today's closes: holdings 623,461.80 + cash 891,771.10 = total 1,515,232.90; cum return +1.49% -> +1.02% on the down day (all 5 holdings red but FABL/MEBL defensive). Deployed 41.1%, cash 58.9%. Sector of invested: Banks 36.1% / Fertilizer 31.5% / Cement 18.6% / E&P 13.8% (banks sleeve down from 38% post-UBL-exit). NO new trades; HOLD all. INDU = top scan candidate but Shariah UNCONFIRMED -> RAW CANDIDATE only (R-PROC-001). // 2026-06-19 (UBL FULL EXIT): Ahmad sold all 50sh UBL @ 444.15 in real EClear account (avg cost 397.83 → +11.64%, realized gain ~2,316 PKR). Net proceeds ~22,174.50 PKR. Cash 869,596.60 → 891,771.10. UBL removed from holdings (was the flagged WEAKEST-fit / non-compliant FULL-EXIT candidate). Holdings now 5 (FABL, FFC, LUCK, MEBL, OGDC); banks-sleeve concentration reduced. Realized gain was already carried as unrealized in book value, so total value & cum-return % unchanged by the sale itself; deployed % drops, dry powder rises for compliant swing/yield rotation. // 2026-06-18 (CASH INJECTION): Ahmad added +500,000 PKR (5 lakh) fresh cash. Cash 369,596.60 -> 869,596.60. starting_cash re-based 1,000,000 -> 1,500,000 so cum-return % stays honest (a deposit is NOT a gain). Total value 1,522,286.60; cum return re-based to +1.49% (was +2.23% on 1M base — same profit, bigger denominator). Deployed 42.9%, cash 57.1% = 869,597 dry powder for swing entries + KSE-100 new-opportunity adds. // 2026-06-18: Ahmad added 60sh OGDC in real EClear account (now 260sh @ avg 322.79; was 200sh @ 319.11). Buy ~335.06/sh, cost 20,103.40 PKR. Cash 389,700 → 369,596.60. Total cost basis now 630,403.40 PKR. ADD logged to trade_ledger. // 2026-06-17 sync: Portfolio synced to real EClear holdings. Removed PPL, DGKC, CHCC; added LUCK (250sh @ 453.80). Adjusted FABL 841→1000, FFC 197→350, OGDC 372→200, MEBL 202→250, UBL 199→50. Cash reset to 389,700 (= 1M - 610,300 cost basis). Cum +1.89% from 1M start. Max drawdown tracked from sync point forward.
